---
title: Architecture
description: TakPay system architecture.
---

# Architecture

## Stack

- Next.js 16
- React 19
- Supabase
- Reown AppKit
- wagmi + viem
- Arc Testnet
- Circle Developer-Controlled Wallets
- Vercel

## Components

```txt
Merchant Dashboard
  -> Invoice API
  -> Supabase

Public Checkout
  -> Reown AppKit
  -> Arc Testnet USDC transfer
  -> Verification API

Verification API
  -> Arc RPC
  -> Agent Engine
  -> Supabase status update
  -> Webhook delivery
  -> Circle settlement

Agent Dashboard
  -> Agent APIs
  -> agent_decisions / refund_requests / agent_metrics
```

## Key libraries

- `src/lib/verify-payment.ts`: Arc transaction verification
- `src/lib/agent.ts`: decision engine
- `src/lib/webhook.ts`: signed webhook delivery
- `src/lib/circle-wallet.ts`: Circle wallet settlement
- `src/lib/cctp.ts`: cross-chain routing configuration
